name: openrock
description: Self-hosted TCP tunnel service with a React dashboard and local forwarding agent.

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build -w @openrock/desktop-client
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @openrock/shared && npm run build -w @openrock/agent && npm run build -w @openrock/server && npm run build -w @openrock/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck -w @openrock/shared && npm run typecheck -w @openrock/agent && npm run typecheck -w @openrock/server && npm run typecheck -w @openrock/web && npm run typecheck -w @openrock/desktop-client
